title: Fix a copy/paste error in a man page
body: Well, I think we can all tell what I used as a template when writing the "inspect" man page.

comments.body: :bulb: This pull request was already approved, no need to approve it again.

The reason is that this commit was already merged into master: https://github.com/projectatomic/buildah/commit/9bcd86d87b17e0c9cd47589934bc6d4d077d509b, which confuses the bot. Looks like we can close this one?
(Though we should probably provide a better error message for this).
That's weird.  I could've sworn that it hadn't been merged.  Thanks for running it down!  Closing.
